---
title: "Fig 4m - Arp3 KO line profile, actin-focus variant"
output: html_notebook
params:
  genotype: "Arp3KO"
  final_plot_channel: "Ch3"
  pdf_name: "Actin_profile.pdf"
  write_csvs: TRUE
---

<!--
================================================================================
  Wrapper for Fig 4m, Arp3 KO genotype, "actin focus" variant.
================================================================================
  Includes the canonical template at:
      ../../templates/fig04m_line_profile_coloc.Rmd

  Parameters supplied above:
    - genotype = "Arp3KO"              -> Ch2 (actin) NA cutoff = 25
                                          CSV prefix = "Arp3KO"
    - final_plot_channel = "Ch3"       -> final ribbon plot is df_summary3
                                          (NMIIb profile)
    - pdf_name = "Actin_profile.pdf"   -> ggsave filename for the panel.
                                          (Legacy filename retained for
                                           byte-equivalent reproduction.)
    - write_csvs = TRUE                -> also emit Arp3KO_actin.csv +
                                          Arp3KO_NMIIb.csv as Source Data tables.

  Original 248-line monolithic wrapper extracted into a template on
  2026-05-12.
-->

```{r child = "../../templates/fig04m_line_profile_coloc.Rmd"}
```
